evidence.christian_framing: Family and household lyric are framed as intimate cultural memory without occult, primitive-superstition, or hostile ethnographic register.
evidence.decolonization: Kostomarov and kolomyika framing are bounded and Ukrainian-centered, avoiding imperial or flattening analogies.
evidence.provenance: Only the Wikisource public-domain lullaby is hosted as a reading; linked/paraphrased sources are not over-quoted, and activity excerpts are marked as verbatim or paraphrase.
evidence.review: Claude Opus 4.8 review task review-folk-m16-clearance-current2 cleared content/source blockers; its M15 forward-nav finding was fixed by regenerating striletski-povstanski-pisni.mdx.
evidence.source_hygiene: Python QG, activity validation, vocabulary validation, MDX validation, MDX generation drift, resource liveness, and Starlight build pass for FOLK M16.
